meaning: n.烟洞,烟道,暖气管,蓬松的东西,渔网
examples: The fruity type flue-cured tobacco essence mainly consists of trans-2-hexenal, hexenyl formate and the like.
By the early 1980s almost 50 percent of flue-cured tobacco was harvested by machine.
Said the flea, "Let us fly！" Said the fly, "Let us flee！" So they flew through a flaw in the flue.
CCS, where carbon is removed from the flue gases, could be retrofitted to many existing plants.
Post-combustion, CO2 is removed from flue gas by passing it through a liquid amine which dissolves the CO2.
